User.title: User
User.description: Registered customer or administrator profile containing system permissions

id.description: The Firestore Document ID, which corresponds to the Firebase Auth UID

name.description: The display name of the customer

isAdmin.description: Flag indicating if the user is a boutique owner/administrator

CustomOrder.title: CustomOrder
CustomOrder.description: A customized product design and delivery request placed by a customer

userId.description: The UID of the user who submitted this order

occasionType.description: Event category like marriage, engagement, graduation, newborn

customText.description: Specific texts or names to be engraved/crafted

details.description: Additional user personalization notes and preferences

status.description: Real-time state tracking of order completion

metroStation.description: Metro station name selected for Giza/Cairo delivery

createdAtRaw.description: ISO format timestamp of order click

priceEGP.description: Final EGP price set by Nona (Admin) manually

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Real-time state change or administrative notification for the client

title.description: Enriched title of notification in Arabic

orderId.description: Reference ID for the customized design order

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles stored securely with document path matching their auth UID

/orders/{orderId}.description: Direct custom design orders with real-time sync capabilities

/notifications/{notificationId}.description: Customer specific change of status push alerts list
